hints.text: All coverage = **'shitcam'** (newer, dimmer & hazier variant than India/Nigeria); car often fully blurred — big back blur + smaller front blur; a **slanted side antenna** often visible
hints.uniq_note: Dim hazy shitcam + Portuguese = São Tomé instantly.

shared_with.note: Nigeria's shitcam is the brighter original.

hints.text: **Portuguese** is the main language; Portuguese-style infrastructure: **ladder poles** + Portugal-design pedestrian signs

shared_with.note: The other Portuguese SV countries look nothing alike.
shared_with.diff: Tiny rainforest island + shitcam → São Tomé.

hints.text: Tropical islands **almost fully rainforest**; banana plants everywhere
Some wooden poles **painted blue at the bottom** w/ the letters **CST**
**Island meta**: Príncipe = even dimmer desaturated shitcam + car w/ **blue roof + silver rails**; São Tomé = **black car w/ black rails** (mostly blurred)
**Spotlights**: oil-palm plantations → southern São Tomé; **Trindade** = poles w/ red-white paint
